title: Farm internship at Quinta Vale da Lama — registration opens July 2026
description: Vale da Lama is opening registration in July 2026 for its 6-month residential regenerative-farming internship (next cohort begins early November 2026). Interns work alongside the land team in organic market gardening and holistic farm care on a 43-hectare regenerative farm in SW Algarve, Portugal, and complete a full Permaculture Design Course. Shared accommodation and three vegetarian meals are provided; a 100-euro administration fee applies. Suited to mature, motivated people seeking deep, hands-on grounding in regenerative land stewardship.
